summary: An ANF news report clip showing two police officers crouched on a nighttime parking lot examining the ground beside an evidence marker, one holding a flashlight. A chyron reads 'SUSPECT ARRESTED IN THREE DEKALB COUNTY SHOOTINGS', with an Atlanta weather strip at the bottom.

script.scene: Two officers examine the ground in a nighttime parking lot beside an evidence marker; chyron 'SUSPECT ARRESTED IN THREE DEKALB COUNTY SHOOTINGS'.
The same nighttime scene footage continues.

notable_text: SUSPECT ARRESTED IN THREE DEKALB COUNTY SHOOTINGS; ANF
